scenario: Married filing jointly with W-2s ($85k + $62k) and Form 5695 Part II §25C: heat pump $8,000 (cap $2,000) + windows $2,500 (cap $600) = $2,600 credit
source: IRS VITA Pub 4491 TY2025, illustrative case — Energy Credits module (Form 5695 Part II §25C); heat pump cap $2,000, windows cap $600
